demographic_profile.summary: Product managers, UX/UI designers, and product designers working in cross-functional teams at tech companies or product-focused organizations. They prioritize tools and processes that enable seamless collaboration between design and engineering, emphasize user research and data-driven decisions, and focus on iterative product development. Their biggest frustrations include misaligned stakeholders, inefficient handoff processes, and tools that don't integrate well with their existing workflow.
